description: Weaviate is an open-source vector database used to store objects, vectors, and indexes for AI and search applications. It is available as self-hosted software and as a managed cloud service, with related tools for querying data and accessing documentation from AI assistants.
summary: Weaviate exposes a REST API, a GraphQL search API, a built-in Streamable HTTP MCP server for database access, and a hosted Docs MCP server; database surfaces use API key or OIDC bearer auth depending on deployment.
